root: ^Bird: "Hey, it's been a while, hasn't it?"

c-0: ^Bird: "I'm not sure. I've been counting how many times the moon came and went, but after a certain point I lost track."
c-1: ^Bird: "Really? If anything, you shouldn't be here. Your balloon doesn't seem to be doing too great, I'm shocked you made it this high."

c-0: ^Bird: "I don't believe you. You're still a terrible liar, just like the old days."
^Bird: "Remember when we used to play that detective card game together? Every time you were the criminal, I swear your voice would go up an octave."
^Bird: "I miss our time together. I wish we could spend every moment together again!"
^Bird: "Do you think we'll ever see each other again?"
c-1: ^Bird: "I can tell. I guess it's my turn to help you! I need to repay you for all of the times you would pick me up to get milkshakes whenever I felt like I needed to step away from home for a bit."
^Bird: "Even though those were scary nights, I still miss them. I wish we could spend practically every night together again!"
^Bird: "Do you think we'll ever have another us night again?"

choice_three: ^We can't. We stop each other from going where we need to.

c-0: ^Bird: "I knew I could count on you. I don't even know why I asked, of course we would."
^Bird: "You know, I need to think of you more like the moon. Even though sometimes I look up and I can't find you, I know you're still there and I'll see you again soon."
^Bird: "I always felt like whenever you left, it would be the last time I ever saw you, so I guess I just never let you leave. I'm sorry."
^Bird: "Thank you for all the sacrifices you've made for me. I'm getting pretty tired, I don't think my wings were meant for flying this high."
^Bird: "I know you're going to keep rising to greater heights than I could even dream of, but please don't forget your promise."
^Bird: "Come back to Earth every once in a while, okay? If you really want me to, I can pop your balloon and you can come back to Earth now. You seem a bit tired, you could use the rest."
c-1: ^Bird: "Oh. I guess that's true. I'm sorry, I must have really dragged you down all those years…"
^Bird: "You were the best friend I ever had, and I know you sacrificed a lot of your time to take care of me. It was definitely too much time."
^Bird: "I fly parallel to the world, but you need to keep rising from it to reach your destination."
^Bird: "Maybe I'm selfish— no, I definitely am, but please at least remember me every once in a while?"
^Bird: "If we can't be together on this journey, the fact that our journeys crossed paths is something we can celebrate."
